arabic: حَدَّثَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ، حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى، وَابْنُ، مَهْدِيٍّ قَالاَ حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ، مِثْلَهُ وَإِذَا كَرِهَ شَيْئًا عُرِفَ فِي وَجْهِهِ‏.‏

english.text:
A similar Hadith (i e. No. 762) with this addition: And if he (i.e. the Prophet) disliked something, the 
sign of aversion would appear on his face.

chapter.english: Virtues and Merits of the Prophet (pbuh) and his Companions
